_comment: Project-scope settings. Commit this file. Personal overrides → .claude/settings.local.json (git-ignored).

model._comment: TODO: Set preferred model for this project. Override per-task via CLI flag.

tools._comment: Restrict tools to only what this project requires. Each registered tool = startup token cost.
tools._note: Add MCP tool names only when required for a specific workflow. Remove when done.

mcp._comment: TODO: List only MCP servers required for this project. Each schema loads at startup.

hooks._comment: PreCompact hook: extracts TodoWrite tasks + modified files before memory wipe.

permissions._comment: TODO: Lock down blast radius. Deny destructive operations unless explicitly needed.

extended_thinking._comment: Cap thinking budget. Unconstrained extended thinking = runaway output token cost.

system_prompt._comment: Dynamic metadata must NOT be in system prompt — it breaks prefix cache.
